name: automatic-scanning-log-skill
description: Scan project services, persist log metadata, and expose skills for listing and querying logs.

interface.shortDescription: Scan services and query their logs from Codex skills.
interface.longDescription: Detect project services, build a reusable log config, and provide standard skills for listing services, querying logs, and chaining debugging workflows.
defaultPrompt: Scan this project and build a log service catalog.
Show the latest logs for orders-api.
Find recent error lines for edge-proxy.
